text:
loyalty, faithfulness or devotion to a person, country, group, or cause, also known as adherence, faithfulness, loyalness, faithful, allegiance, loyal. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "behavior"
- opposite of: "betrayal (applies to part: human behavior)"
- Commons category: "Fides"
- main Wikidata property: "allegiance"
- said to be the same as: "allegiance",
 "fidelity"
- instance of: "emotion",
 "personality trait"
- facet of: "psychology"
- described by source: "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition"
